result.name: Monstrous glowing roach
result.text:
Level 5, Speed defense as level 4; Armor 2; mandible attack inflicts 7 damage and results in a check on the Glowing Roach Effects table.

Glowing Roach Effects[[/r d6]]

Effect

1

Head wound: Intellect defense tasks hindered

2

Wounded leg: Speed defense tasks hindered

3

Gut wound: Might defense tasks hindered

4

Spit in eye: Perception tasks hindered

5

Limb numb: Physical tasks hindered

6

Lingering radioactive effect: Refer to Radiation in the Real World and possibly Incredible Mutations if your game has such fantastic elements.

Monstrous glowing roach
Level 5 (target number 15)
Health: 15
Armor: 2
Damage: 7
